reviews.review_description:
Amazing Super Smash Bros.–style game brought into VR. It’s packed with upgrades, great animations, and a wide variety of weapons. The gameplay is genuinely fun and full of humor, and the developers did an excellent job adapting it for the Quest—especially with the large VR screens, which really enhance the experience.
My only suggestion would be to slightly improve the resolution sharpness so it’s a bit easier on the eyes during longer sessions.

reviews.review_title: 5 star game should not be rated below  4
reviews.review_description:
This is a 2d game that is extremely fun, fast gameplay that doesn’t lose its charm in VR.  The gameplay, graphics, characters, unique gameplay, and special powers is a blast to play.  Multiplayer is chaotic fun, and you can team up to battle another team, or play 1v1, or with ai bots.

Meta needs more games like this!

There are bugs apparently  caused by the last Meta update.  Launching a game is hit or miss.   I’m assuming the bugs will get resolved which is why I’m giving 5 stars.  The game should not be rated below 4 stars, it’s that good!

reviews.review_title: HeadHunters is Pure Hype! This Game Goes
reviews.review_description:
Honestly, I wasn't expecting much, but HeadHunters is actually incredibly fun. It’s easily one of the best platform fighters I’ve played recently—just pure, chaotic fun.

The Visuals are Super Clean
The game actually looks great. Instead of the usual cluttered pixel-mess you see in some indies, the art style really pops and the animations are surprisingly polished. The hit effects are super satisfying.

The Body-Swap Mechanic is Top Tier
The real standout feature here is the body-swap. It completely changes how you approach a match and keeps the gameplay from getting stale.

HeadHunters delivers a fast-paced and accessible VR action experience. The gameplay is intuitive, responsive, and satisfying, making it easy to jump in while still offering a rewarding challenge. A solid and enjoyable VR title for action fans. A pure arcade gem!
A really fun game! I played with a friend, me on quest and him on pc desktop version, and we couldnt stop laughing. Highly recommendes! Hank havok is the best character
Doesn't work. Just big circle that blacks out one eye or the other.

developer_response.body:
Edit: This issue has been resolved in version 1.0.16. It was caused by a compatibility problem affecting some devices after the latest Meta OS update.

Edit: We managed to reproduce the problem and we are working in a fix.

Edit: 
Hello, we’ve seen a few reports of this issue recently. It appears to be related to a recent Oculus system update, as resetting the headset resolves the problem.

We haven’t been able to reproduce the issue on our side, and the game is working correctly for the majority of players.

We completely understand how frustrating this can be, and we’re sorry for the inconvenience. We’d really appreciate giving the reset a try, as it has helped others resolve the issue.

---

Hey! Thanks for reporting this, that definitely shouldn’t be happening

Could you let us know which VR headset you’re using? That would help us  a lot.

What you’re describing (a black circle covering one eye) is usually related to rendering issues. A few things that might help:

Try restarting the headset completely
Make sure your headset software is fully updated
Reinstall the game
In some cases, we’ve seen this happen when the headset OS is out of date or after a bad install. A player reported this exact problem and he fixed it reinstalling the headset OS.

reviews.review_title: Coulda be-a Contenda. Is it-a just a-me?
reviews.review_description: Could be an incredible game, but it seems infected by that black circle from Creepshow 2, which stays in the middle of the screen in front of me, such that I cain't see what's goin' on...

developer_response.body:
Edit: This issue has been resolved in version 1.0.16. It was caused by a compatibility problem affecting some devices after the latest Meta OS update.

Edit: We managed to reproduce the problem and we are working in a fix.

Hello, we’ve seen a few reports of this issue recently. It appears to be related to a recent Oculus system update, as resetting the headset resolves the problem.

We haven’t been able to reproduce the issue on our side, and the game is working correctly for the majority of players.

We completely understand how frustrating this can be, and we’re sorry for the inconvenience. We’d really appreciate giving the reset a try, as it has helped others resolve the issue.

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome 👏 as you feel the control, instant reception!10/10
